title: Shortened swords
description: Very short swords for PvP games.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/874155e4166f2f91a340c0935f88704122091e24_0.webp)
- Shortened Swords is the resourcepack that replaces original sword textures with a more shortened version to increase viewing area. It will help you in the PvP games like Bedwars, PvP, skywars, etc.
  
- The resourcepack uses simplified style that improves perfomance

**Enjoy!**
